'''ngathuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyak|kyak]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-th-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyak|kyak]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngathuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæthithith|ngæthithith]] || [[word:ngæthithij|ngæthithij]] || [[word:ngæthithish|ngæthithish]] || [[word:ngæthithi|ngæthithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngathuthuthuth|ngathuthuthuth]] || [[word:ngathuthuthuj|ngathuthuthuj]] || [[word:ngathuthuthush|ngathuthuthush]] || [[word:ngathuthuthu|ngathuthuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngathuthuth|ngathuthuth]] || [[word:ngathuthuj|ngathuthuj]] || [[word:ngathuthush|ngathuthush]] || [[word:ngathuthu|ngathuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngathufthuth|ngathufthuth]] || [[word:ngathufthuj|ngathufthuj]] || [[word:ngathufthush|ngathufthush]] || [[word:ngathufthuf|ngathufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngathuthuthu|ngathuthuthu]] || [[word:ngathuthuju|ngathuthuju]] || [[word:ngathuthushu|ngathuthushu]] || [[word:ngathuthuku|ngathuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngathuthuth|ngathuthuth]] || [[word:ngathuthuj|ngathuthuj]] || [[word:ngathuthush|ngathuthush]] || [[word:ngathuthu|ngathuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngathuthuthul|ngathuthuthul]] || [[word:ngathuthujul|ngathuthujul]] || [[word:ngathuthushul|ngathuthushul]] || [[word:ngathuthukul|ngathuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngathuthuthuthu|ngathuthuthuthu]] || [[word:ngathuthujuju|ngathuthujuju]] || [[word:ngathuthushushu|ngathuthushushu]] || [[word:ngathuthuku|ngathuthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngathuthuthun|ngathuthuthun]] || [[word:ngathuthujun|ngathuthujun]] || [[word:ngathuthushun|ngathuthushun]] || [[word:ngathuthukun|ngathuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngathuthuthuoro|ngathuthuthuoro]] || [[word:ngathuthujuoro|ngathuthujuoro]] || [[word:ngathuthushuoro|ngathuthushuoro]] || [[word:ngathuthukuoro|ngathuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
